exercises.hindiScript: मैंने आपका संदेश पढ़ लिया है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Thanks and regards.
I need to know the time of the meeting.
I will not be able to attend this meeting.
I have read your message.

exercises.hindiScript: मैं कल तक जवाब दे दूंगा।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I am working on this project.
Please schedule a conference call.
Please send me the report.
I will reply by tomorrow.

exercises.audioScript: This email was sent by mistake.

options: Please give this priority.

options: I have read your message.

exercises.hindiScript: कृपया इस मामले में जल्दी कार्रवाई करें।

dictationPassage.text: I have read your message. I will reply by tomorrow. This email was sent by mistake. Please ignore this. I need to know the time of the meeting.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मैंने आपका संदेश पढ़ लिया है। मैं कल तक जवाब दे दूंगा। यह ईमेल गलती से भेजा गया। कृपया इसे नज़रअंदाज़ करें। मुझे मीटिंग का समय पता चाहिए।
